title: Implement SQLite Database Layer
description: Create the SQLite database schema and Rust data access layer using tauri-plugin-sql. Design tables for: tickets (id, title, description, status, priority, complexity, parent_id, created_at, updated_at), agents (id, name, status, current_ticket_id, pid, started_at), sessions (id, context, created_at), and settings (key, value). Implement CRUD functions exposed via Tauri commands.
acceptance_criteria: SQLite database file created at app data directory on first launch
Schema migrations run automatically on app start
Rust functions for create, read, update, delete on all tables compile
Tauri commands exposed: get_tickets, create_ticket, update_ticket, delete_ticket
Foreign key constraints enforce referential integrity
Indexes on frequently queried columns (status, priority, parent_id)
agent_output: SQLite database layer implemented with useTickets and useSettings hooks, including full CRUD operations and table schema for tickets, sessions, and settings.
